data.title: Stellantis-CATL Joint Venture Unveils $4.3 Billion Battery Plant Plan In Spain
data.description: STLA shares up premarket as they partner with CATL to invest in a €4.1 billion joint venture for a carbon-neutral battery plant in Zaragoza, Spain.

data.title: Europe Markets End Gain Streak, Crude Oil Falls, Gold Gains - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets closed lower on 12/9 as tech stocks declined due to Chinese antitrust probe. Futures mixed, oil prices down, gold up. Asian markets mixed.

data.title: As Eli Lilly Shares Gain Over 35% YTD, Drugmaker Announces $15B Share Buyback Program And Boosts Dividend By 15%
data.description: According to the announcement, the share repurchase program allows for flexibility in purchasing methods, including open market and privately negotiated transactions.

Rocket Lab Achieves Milestone In Hypersonic Testing for DoD's MACH-TB Project
data.description: Rocket Lab successfully launched hypersonic technology for the U.S. Department of Defense, showcasing their capabilities in advanced defense and aerospace.
